basic_details.job_title: DSH Hospitals Kurnool Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 16 Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists / Civil Assistant Surgeon Posts
basic_details.post_name: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists / Civil Assistant Surgeon (General)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: OC: 42 years, EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years, Differently abled: 52 years as on 01.07.2026. Ex-servicemen get 3 years relaxation.
age_limit.details: OC: 42 years EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years Differently abled persons: 52 years as on 01.07.2026 Ex-servicemen: 3 years relaxation in addition to the length of service rendered by him in the armed forces.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956 and registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity for Specialists. MBBS or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956 and registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity for General.
qualification.details: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist: Must have passed PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity. Civil Assistant Surgeon (General): Must have passed MBBS or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,10,000/- for Specialist, Rs.61,960/- for General
salary_details.details: Civil Assistant surgeon specialist : Rs.1,10,000/- Civil Assistant Surgeon General: Rs.61,960/-

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit and rule of reservation Merit list will be prepared for all the candidates who applied and fulfilled all the eligibility conditions. Selection lists will be prepared based on merit lists and Rule of Reservation issued in AP State and Subordinate Services.

all_official_links.label: Download DSH Hospitals Kurnool Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSH Hospitals Kurnool Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly on 18 June 2026. There is no separate last date for application submission.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Civil Assistant Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: A total of 16 vacancies are available for the posts of Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) in DSH Hospitals Kurnool.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist?
faq.answer: For Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist, candidates must possess a PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the relevant specialty and be registered with the A.P. Medical Council with current validity.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is 42 years for OC candidates, 47 years for EWS/SC/ST/BC candidates, and 52 years for Differently abled persons as of 01.07.2026. Ex-servicemen are eligible for age relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist?
faq.answer: The salary for a Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist is Rs. 1,10,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Civil Assistant Surgeon (General)?
faq.answer: The salary for a Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) is Rs. 61,960/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Office of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Kurnool (Campus of Regional Family Training Centre (Female)), near District Medical & Health Office, Kurnool.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
